owner_operator_stated: Named entity 'Albert and Albert Dental Health Associated' (708-354-0585, pediatric-dentistry taxonomy 1223P0221X per its NPI org record) is registered at 911 N Elm St, Hinsdale. That multi-suite building currently houses two unrelated, currently-operating practices under different names and different phones: 'Brush Pediatric Dentistry' (Ste 228, founded 2011 by Dr. Mira Albert, pediatric dentist, phone 630-504-2223) and 'Hinsdale Dentistry' (Ste 230, general/cosmetic, phone 630-323-4468). Neither current phone matches the record's (708) 354-0585. The shared 'Albert' surname and matching pediatric-dentistry specialty strongly suggest 'Albert and Albert Dental Health Associated' is the pre-rebrand NPI organizational registration for what now operates as Brush Pediatric Dentistry, but Brush's own site makes no mention of the prior name.
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: no live site or listing corroborates the record's exact phone (708) 354-0585 at 911 N Elm St; the building now houses two unrelated current practices (Brush Pediatric Dentistry Ste 228 and Hinsdale Dentistry Ste 230), neither with a matching phone. The pediatric-dentistry taxonomy and 'Albert' name overlap with Dr. Mira Albert (Brush Pediatric Dentistry founder) suggest a likely rebrand/successor, but this could not be confirmed on Brush's own site, so both entities are reported without asserting which succeeded which.

notes: Address corroborated exactly: NPI record for Krishneha PLLC lists '930 N York Rd Ste 140, Hinsdale, Illinois, 60521-8680', matching the record's normalized_address, and a search-result snippet for hinsdaleoralsurgery.com's contact page independently shows the identical '930 N. Direct WebFetch of hinsdaleoralsurgery.com returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocked), so no roster or careers page could be directly verified beyond the owner name found via NPI lookup; taxonomy is oral & maxillofacial surgery (specialist), not general dentistry. The same suite building was previously associated with a different oral surgeon, Gregory N Stevens DMD Ltd, but Krishneha PLLC/Dr. Tandon is confirmed as the entity currently registered at this exact address, so this is not flagged as a conflict.
